candidate.completion: flirt with me before I start naming the houseplants after exes.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please flirt with me before I start naming the houseplants after exes.

evaluation.rationale: The line has a clear comic escalation and a vivid specific image, but it justifies the plea more than it sharply reverses it. 'Houseplants after exes' is the right kind of precise flourish, though the path to it is a little long and the overall shape feels more like a good contemporary joke than compressed classic wit.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
